hero.subline: Clean sludge and debris from your heating system to improve radiator output and boiler efficiency.

trust.guaranteeText: Clear fixed quote before work starts

pricing.pricingDisclaimer: Power flushing pricing varies by system size, sludge condition, and whether a magnetic filter service is needed.

faults.title: Cold radiators
faults.description: Some radiators stay cold while others get hot.

faults.title: Dirty water
faults.description: Black or discoloured water when bleeding radiators.

faults.title: Poor circulation
faults.description: System struggles to move heat evenly around the home.

faults.title: Boiler lockouts
faults.description: Repeated flow-related lockouts linked to sludge build-up.

faults.title: Radiator noise
faults.description: Gurgling, banging, or trapped-air sounds from the system.

faults.title: Filter blockage
faults.description: Magnetic filter collecting excessive debris from the circuit.

proofCards.reviewSnippet: Great result after one visit and much quieter boiler.
Fast response and clear explanation throughout.

faqs.question: How often should a system be power flushed?
faqs.answer: It depends on system condition, but many homes benefit when symptoms appear or before major upgrades.

faqs.question: Do you work on all boiler brands?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are accredited for Vaillant and Glow-worm and can advise across all major brands.

seo.title: Power Flushing in Hayes | Empire Home Solutions
seo.description: Domestic power flushing in Hayes to remove sludge, improve circulation, and help your heating system run efficiently.
